tagline: Trusted Pool Cleaning & Repair Experts Serving Los Angeles

hero.headline: We Never Skip Your Pool Day
hero.subheadline: Pop's Pool Service guarantees every scheduled visit with detailed photo reports after each cleaning. Family-owned for 15+ years, serving the San Fernando Valley with old-school reliability and modern transparency.
checkmarks: NO Skipped Stops - Every Visit Guaranteed
Photo Reports with pH & Chemical Stats After Each Service

services.headline: Complete Pool Care Under One Roof
services.subtitle: From weekly maintenance to emergency green pool rescues, our certified team handles it all so you can just enjoy the water.

cards.title: Weekly Pool Cleaning
cards.description: Thorough skimming, vacuuming, brushing, and debris removal every single week. No skipped visits, ever.

cards.title: Chemical Balancing & Water Testing
cards.description: Precise water chemistry analysis and adjustment to keep your pool safe, clear, and comfortable for every swim.

cards.title: Green Pool Restoration
cards.description: Intensive treatment protocols that transform neglected green pools back to crystal clear conditions, guaranteed.

cards.title: Equipment Repair & Installation
cards.description: Expert diagnosis and repair of pumps, filters, heaters, and automation systems to keep everything running smoothly.

cards.title: Pool Safety Inspections
cards.description: Comprehensive inspections covering equipment, barriers, drains, and compliance with LA County safety standards.

cards.title: Ongoing Maintenance Programs
cards.description: Year-round care plans with regular filter cleaning, equipment checks, and proactive problem prevention.

how_it_works.headline: Crystal Clear Pool in 3 Simple Steps

steps.title: Schedule Your Visit
steps.description: Call or text us to set up your free pool assessment. We'll find a day that works for your schedule.

steps.title: We Service Your Pool
steps.description: Our certified technicians arrive on time, every time. No skipped stops. We clean, test, and balance your water.

steps.title: Get Your Photo Report
steps.description: Receive a detailed email with photos of your pool, pH levels, chemical readings, and any notes about your backyard.

about.label: Family-Owned Since 2009
about.headline: Old-School Hospitality Meets Modern Pool Care
about.description: Founded by Mark and Aaron, Pop's Pool Service was built on a simple belief: your pool service should never skip a stop, and you should always know exactly what's happening in your backyard. We combine the personal touch of a family business with the transparency of detailed photo reports and chemical documentation after every single visit. With over 15 years in the San Fernando Valley, we treat your pool like it's our own.

features.title: Locally Owned & Family Operated
features.description: Mark and Aaron built this business on personal relationships, not corporate contracts. Every customer gets our direct attention.

features.title: Photo Reports After Every Visit
features.description: Full transparency with photos, pH readings, chemical stats, and notes delivered to your inbox after each service.

features.title: NO Skipped Stops - Guaranteed
features.description: Every scheduled visit happens, period. If we ever miss a stop, your next cleaning is completely free.

pricing.headline: Transparent Pricing, No Surprises
pricing.subtitle: We believe in honest, upfront pricing. Every plan includes our NO Skipped Stops guarantee and detailed photo reports after each service.

guarantee.headline: Our NO Skipped Stops Promise
guarantee.description: When we say every visit is guaranteed, we mean it. If we ever miss a scheduled service, your next cleaning is on us. Plus, you'll receive photo documentation and chemical reports after every visit so you always know the exact condition of your pool. That's the Pop's difference.

faqs.question: What does your NO Skipped Stops policy mean?
faqs.answer: It means exactly what it sounds like. Every scheduled service visit happens, period. Unlike other companies that quietly skip stops when they're busy, we guarantee we show up every single time. If we ever miss a visit, your next service is free.

faqs.question: What's included in the photo report I receive after each cleaning?
faqs.answer: After every service, we email you a detailed report with photos of your pool's condition, current pH balance, chemical readings, any chemicals we added and their quantities, and notes about anything we noticed in your backyard.

faqs.question: Do you offer same-day service for emergencies?
faqs.answer: Yes! We understand that pool emergencies don't wait. Whether it's a green pool, equipment failure, or post-storm cleanup, we offer same-day service availability to get your pool back in shape fast.

faqs.question: What areas in Los Angeles do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve the greater Los Angeles area including Reseda, Burbank, Granada Hills, Van Nuys, North Hollywood, Studio City, Agoura Hills, Thousand Oaks, Sherman Oaks, and throughout the San Fernando Valley.

faqs.question: Are you licensed and insured?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We are fully certified and insured with DPH# PR0315023 and hold a Certified Pool Operator credential (CPO# C-114137). Your property and our work are always protected.

testimonials.name: Verified Google Reviewer
testimonials.text: My pool was a mess after the recent rains, fires and winds. I had fired my last two pool people. Pop's is now my pool service, and the pool looks great after just a few treatments. After every cleaning, I am sent an email with the pH balance and other stats.

testimonials.name: Long-term Client
testimonials.text: Mark and his team are awesome! They have been serving my pool for a year now and I couldn't be happier. The consistency and communication are unlike any pool service I've used before.

testimonials.name: Educated Pool Owner
testimonials.text: Pop's service is outstanding! They're super knowledgeable about the water chemistry side of pool service and helped me understand why my pool kept going green with my previous pool service.

contact.headline: Ready for a Pool Service That Actually Shows Up?
contact.subtitle: Get your free pool assessment and see the Pop's difference. No contracts, no skipped stops, no surprises.
benefits: Detailed service plan tailored to your pool

footer.description: Pop's Pool Service is a family-owned pool care company serving the San Fernando Valley and greater Los Angeles area since 2009. We combine old-school reliability with modern transparency to deliver the ideal pool experience.
footer.service_area: Serving Los Angeles, Reseda, Burbank, Granada Hills, Van Nuys, North Hollywood, Studio City, Agoura Hills, Thousand Oaks, Sherman Oaks & the San Fernando Valley
